title: mineral backpacks
description: This mod will add backpacks of all types of minerals, the rarest ones are the ones that have the most space to store items.
body:
# Mineral Backpacks 🎒⛏️

Mineral Backpacks adds backpacks inspired by Minecraft minerals, allowing you to carry more resources in an organized and stylish way!

🆕 Features:
✔ Unique Backpacks – Leather, Coal, Copper, Iron, Gold, Emerald, Diamond, Netherite and even a special new mineral!

✔ Classic Style – Each backpack has a unique bundle-shaped design, perfectly fitting into the world of Minecraft.

✔ More Space, Less Headache – Efficiently manage your minerals while exploring and mining!

Get ready to expand your inventory and mine like never before! ⚒️

I recommend that you use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) to help with the recipes

• [My site](https://arthurorsi-mods.vercel.app/) •
